settings.question: How Does LED Therapy Affect My Skin?
settings.answer:
LED (Light Emitting Diode) therapy is effective for skincare due to its ability to penetrate the skin at different depths, depending on the wavelength of light used. Different colors of light penetrate the skin to varying depths, and each color, or wavelength, targets specific skin issues:
- Blue Light (400-495 nm): Penetrates the uppermost layers of the skin and is effective in treating acne by killing acne-causing bacteria (P. acnes). Blue light therapy can also help with a variety of skin conditions, including eczema, psoriasis, sun damage and scars caused by acne. It can also improve skin texture and reduce enlarged oil glands.
- Red Light (620-750 nm): Penetrates deeper into the skin and promotes collagen production, helps to reduce wrinkles and fine lines, and improves skin texture and tone. Red light therapy works by stimulating cells to absorb light wavelengths, which activates their mitochondria, and allows them to work more efficiently.
- Amber light (500-750 nm): Increases blood flow and boosts lymphatic flow, which promotes anti-aging.
- Near Infrared light (800-2500 nm): NIR is invisible to the human eye and penetrates skin more deeply to trigger cell growth and regeneration. It recharges the mitochondria, reduces inflammation and improves circulation.

Numerous medical studies and real-world experience support the efficacy of LED therapy for many skin conditions. Many published medical studies have found significant improvements in acne and wrinkles with regular LED treatments. Results are typically seen with consistent use over a period of time, often requiring multiple sessions for optimal results. LED therapy is generally considered safe for all skin types and tones, with minimal to no side effects. However, it should be avoided by individuals with specific medical conditions or those taking photosensitizing medications.

settings.question: How long will it take for LED Therapy to affect my skin?
settings.answer:
The timeline for seeing results with LED light therapy can vary based upon several factors, including the specific skin concern being treated, the wavelength of light used, the frequency and consistency of treatments, and individual skin characteristics. Here is a general overview of what might be expected with treatment:

Acne Treatment (Blue Light)Initial Improvements: Some people notice a reduction in active acne and inflammation within a few sessions, typically within 1-2 weeks.
More Noticeable Results: Significant improvements in acne can often be seen after 4-8 weeks of consistent treatment, with sessions typically performed 2-3 times per week.
Maintenance: Continued use may be necessary to maintain results and to prevent new breakouts.

Anti-Aging (Red Light)/(Amber Light)Initial Improvements: Subtle improvements in skin texture and tone might be noticeable within 2-4 weeks of consistent treatment.
More Noticeable Results: Reduction in fine lines and wrinkles, increased firmness, and improved skin tone often become more apparent after 8-12 weeks of regular use, with sessions usually performed 3-5 times per week.
Maintenance: Ongoing treatments are recommended to maintain and to further enhance the results.

Hyperpigmentation and Skin Rejuvenation (Red and Near-Infrared Light)Initial Improvements: Early improvements in skin tone and reduction in hyperpigmentation may be seen within 4-6 weeks.
More Noticeable Results: More dramatic changes, including reduced pigmentation and overall skin rejuvenation, typically become noticeable after 8-12 weeks of regular treatment.
Regular, consistent treatments are key to achieving and maintaining results. Skipping sessions will delay progress.
Maintenance: Continued use may be necessary to maintain results.
Individual skin characteristics, such as thickness, sensitivity, and baseline condition can affect how quickly results are seen. Also, not all LED therapy is equal, and it is important to seek professional-grade devices and treatments. All Metamorphosis devices are FDA 510(k) cleared and undergo independent, clinical testing.

settings.question: What Makes Metamorphosis Red Light Devices Unique?
settings.answer: All Metamorphosis products provide targeted, revolutionary skincare. SuperStar, a hands-free, portable, first-of-its-kind acne-fighting marvel, destroys P.acnes bacteria using Red and Blue LED lights to deliver hygienic, precise and zoned skin care. MagicMoons deeply target multiple wavelengths of light to boost collagen, to support elastin and to smooth texture and uneven skin tone, while diminishing puffy bags and dark circles in the delicate eye area. Lush Lips is a bite-free, lip-plumping, wrinkle-reducing superhero combination of four wavelenghts of light which fight the breakdown of collagen to promote visibly fuller, more defined, plumper and more youthful-looking lips over time. Each device is housed in sleek, hard-cased rechargers for effortless portability anytime, anywhere. All devices can either be held in place by the user or by attaching hypoallergenic, double-sided, thin and PVC-transparent stickers which allow light to penetrate deep layers of the skin. Crafted from supple and medical-grade silicone gel and equipped with intelligent timing features, these devices cater to all skin types with comfort and simplicity. Each device includes a luxurious, suede-like travel pouch, ensuring a complete skincare regimen for on-the-go portability.

settings.question: Is it necessary to avoid the sun after an LED treatment?
settings.answer: We recommend the use of sunscreen everyday. Any direct exposure to the sun ages the skin very rapidly. Our devices work best with consistent use. Great skin is not impossible and is not a miracle, but it does require dedication and committment.

settings.question: Are Metamorphosis Red Light Devices safe to use?
settings.answer:
Supported by many clinical and professional medical studies, LED therapy has been utilized in medical and aesthetic practices for decades. Metamorphosis' products allow for LED treatments to be enjoyed anywhere at anytime. Unlike harsh treatments that can cause redness or peeling, Metamorphosis LED therapy is painless, non-invasive, and requires no downtime.

Metamorphosis Red Light devices are FDA 510(k)-cleared and proven safe for all skin types, with no pain or adverse side effects. They emit no heat or UV light, using only clinically-proven wavelengths beneficial for your skin.

If you are pregnant, undergoing chemotherapy, have epilepsy or photoallergies, or are taking medications that cause light sensitivity (such as steroid or cortisone injections, anti-arthritic medication, or Accutane), we recommend consulting your doctor before use.

settings.question: Light Sensitivity Test
settings.answer:
We highly recommend performing a light sensitivity test prior to first-time use.

1. Place the device on your inner forearm.

2. Turn on the device.

3. Wait for the 3-minute session to complete.

4. Immediately stop if you feel any discomfort or heat on your skin during the treatment. This may indicate sensitivity to light.

5. After the session, remove the device and wait for at least 24 hours.

6. Regularly check your skin over the next 24 hours. If you notice any redness or itching, discontinue use of the device.

settings.question: Should anyone avoid using LED therapy?
settings.answer: If you are pregnant, undergoing chemotherapy, being treated for epilepsy or any other medical condition, have a light sensitivity, or are under the care of a physician or taking regular courses of medication, please consult with your physician prior to use.

settings.question: What’s the difference between the 3 Hydrogel Masks?
settings.answer:
SuperStar Hydrogel Mask: Targets acne-prone skin with soothing and clarifying ingredients.
MagicMoon Hydrogel Mask: Focuses on firming and rejuvenating the delicate eye area.
LushLips Hydrogel Mask: Hydrates and plumps lips for a fuller, smoother appearance.

settings.question: What are the Stickers and how do they work?
settings.answer: The medical-grade Stickers help LED light devices stay securely in place during treatment. They are transparent and ultra-thin, ensuring maximum light penetration for effective results. Each LED light device comes prepacked with Stickers for immediate use, and refills can be purchased separately to ensure you always have a fresh supply for your treatments.

settings.question: How often should I use the Hydrogel Masks?
settings.answer: For best results, use 2-3 times per week, or as recommended based on your skincare routine and LED therapy frequency.

settings.question: Can I use the Hydrogel without LED light therapy?
settings.answer: Yes! While they are designed to enhance LED treatments, the masks can also be used on their own for deep hydration and skin nourishment.

settings.question: Are the Hydrogel and Stickers safe for sensitive skin?
settings.answer: Yes! Both the Hydrogel Masks and Stickers are made with skin-friendly, hypoallergenic materials and are suitable for sensitive skin. However, if you have specific concerns, we recommend patch testing before use.

settings.question: Will the Hydrogel Masks leave residue on my skin?
settings.answer: No, both our Hydrogel Masks and Stickers are designed to be non-irritating and residue-free, making removal effortless.

settings.question: Are the Stickers reusable?
settings.answer: No, the Stickers are designed for single-use to ensure hygiene and optimal adhesion during each LED therapy session.

settings.question: How often should I use my Metamorphosis devices?
settings.answer:
Recommended usage of Metamorphosis Red Light devices:

Magic Moons: 9 minutes of treatment per day;

Super Stars: 3-minutes of treatment twice per day during acne flare;

LushLips; 3-minutes of treatment once per day until lips are smoothed and soothed;

All devices are self-timed.

Metamorphosis Red Light devices are crafted to seamlessly blend into your daily routine. They're all wireless and rechargeable, allowing you to relax, work or accomplish errands while they work their magic! Just don't sleep with the devices attached to the face or body.

After 4-6 weeks of radiant results, a maintenance routine of using the device 2-4 days per week may be employed to preserve luminous skin!

settings.question: How to Use the Devices:
settings.answer:
1. Carefully remove the circular, double-sided sticker from sheet and apply to the appropriate device area.

2. Remove the back of the sticker at the tab and attach the device to the face.

3 Connect the mini-controller to the device.

4. Press and hold the power button for 1.5 seconds to start the treatment session.

5. After treatment session is finished, remove the mini-controller and the device; Wipe device with clean, dry cloth; Replace mini-controllers into their alloted slots in the recharging case; Replace device into its alloted slot in the recharging case.

6. Apply the complementing hyrdrogel mask to your face for further radiance and treatment. Note: Do not use the devices on open wounds. The devices are reusable and rechargeable. The stickers are disposable, but may be used more than once.

settings.question: Charging Instructions:
settings.answer: If the green light on the charging case is blinking, it indicates low power and the device requires charging. Connect the charging cable to the case for charging. If the mini controller battery is low, simply place it inside the charging case for charging.

settings.question: Will combining the Hydrogel masks with the red light devices amplify my results?
settings.answer: YES!! Metamorphosis hydrogel masks have been formulated to complement use with our red light treatment devices. Hydrogel masks and red light devices may be used alone, but using them together provides faster, more radiant results. If used in tandem, remember to use the red light devices on clean, dry skin; then remove device and apply the "matching" hydrogel mask. Follow individual product directions. Metamophosis' hydrogel masks can be used to fight the most common skin complaints of fine lines, inflammation and lack of hydration.

settings.question: Are Metamorphosis devices safe to use after Botox or fillers?
settings.answer: Yes! Metamorphosis Red Light devices may be used after an injection of Botox or fillers. Red lights assist in speeding the healing process and help to avoid bruises and swelling that sometimes follow injections.

settings.question: Are Metamorphosis devices safe to use after microneedling?
settings.answer: The various wavelengths within Metamorphosis Red Light devices have the potential to expedite the healing phase following microneedling sessions, as the devices enhance the ability to generate collagen and elastin.

settings.question: How should skin be prepped prior to an LED treatment?
settings.answer: Skin should be clean and free of any serums, creams or makeup.  The goal is to have the radiance and energy coming from the LEDs be absorbed directly into the skin.

settings.question: What should be applied to skin after an LED treatment?
settings.answer: There are many serums and creams that are highly beneficial to apply just after use of the LED devices.  Any products containing exosomes, stem cells, collagen, hyaluronic acid or retinol are great pairings with LED treatments as they work together in boosting collagen, elastin and plumping fine lines and wrinkles.

settings.question: What FDA 510(k) cleared means?
settings.answer: With so many LED devices in the marketplace, it is hard to determine which ones work best.  Trying to compare strengths, irradiance and joules (energy output) feels like a science degree is needed, but if a device is labeled as “FDA Cleared,” that means the product claims are verified and the device has been tested for safety and efficacy.  On top of FDA clearance, seeing that a device has undergone independent, third-party clinical trials is very important as these trials are not mandatory but rather the company producing the device wants its customers to understand the value and transparency in the “skin-vest-ment” they are making.  These trials across a broad demographic of skin types should demonstrate that consistent usage of the device leads to improvements in acne, wrinkles or fine lines. It is also helpful to see if the test group recommends the purchase of the device to a friend.

settings.question: How to clean my Metamorphosis red light devices?
settings.answer: Our little powerhouses of light and energy are best carefully cleaned with a slightly damp cloth.  It isn’t necessary to clean after each usage.  Make sure the devices are completely dry before placing back into the hard-case charger for storage.

settings.question: How many uses per day of the devices is suggested?
settings.answer: Each device has its suggested usage time for the desired results. For Magic Moon, it is recommended that a 9-minute exposure per day will do the trick in treating fine lines and wrinkles in the under eye area.  For SuperStar, two 3-minute treatments per day will help to treat the acne and inflammation, and for LushLip, one 3-minute treatment is suggested for treating smoker lines and plumping the lip tissue.  Using in the morning, afternoon or evening is entirely your preference! The efficacy is powerful no matter the time of day.

settings.question: How Long Will my Metamorphosis Red Light Device last before it needs replacement?
settings.answer: All Metamorphosis devices are built to last, and with normal usage should be rechargeable for many, many hours of use!  All devices are guaranteed to be free from material or quality defects for one year from date of purchase.

settings.question: What is your warranty policy?
settings.answer: We guarantee that this product will be free from material and quality defect for one year from the date of purchase. Please note the following warranty limitations: *Misuse, abuse, accidents, attachment of unauthorized accessories, alteration, or damage caused by the user after the purchase is not covered; *We will not be responsible for any incidental, consequential or circumstantial damage; *For warranty service, please return the product (postage paid by customer) with a sales receipt to our approved service center. After repair or replacement, the product will be returned to you (postage paid by us).

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Your order should reach you in about 6-8 business days if you're in the United States. You may also choose expedited shipping, and the devices or masks should reach you in just 2-3 business days.

settings.question: Contact Us
settings.answer: For any questions or collaborations, reach us at info@metamorphosislighttherapy.com
